# Good Breeze AI

> AI-powered competitive intelligence and SEO reports for small and mid-size businesses. Freemium SaaS platform — start free, no credit card required.

## What We Do

Good Breeze AI helps business owners eliminate busywork and scale output without hiring. We generate AI-powered reports that surface competitive gaps, SEO weaknesses, and growth opportunities — in minutes, not weeks.

- **Competitive Analyzer** — Head-to-head comparisons, Top 3 Competitors analysis, and Competitive Position reports
- **SEO Reports** — Technical SEO audits, keyword research, landing page optimization, AI SEO recommendations, and comprehensive SEO analysis
- **Done-for-you AI systems** — Custom automation workflows built for client businesses (custom engagements)

## Products & Pricing

- Free tier: 1 free report (no credit card required)
- Impulse pack: 3 reports for $1
- Starter subscription: $20/month for ongoing access
- Custom engagements: $5K–$20K for done-for-you AI automation systems

## Target Audience

Small business owners, marketing consultants, and agency operators who want AI-powered competitive and SEO intelligence without enterprise pricing or complexity.
